title: Big Technology AI Summit (full): Greg Brockman, Mike Krieger, Aaron Levie & Friends of The Podcast
summary: The Big Technology AI Summit convened industry leaders on June 18, 2026 to discuss the federal government's forced recall of Anthropic's frontier models Fable and Mythos. Panelists debated whether this regulatory action constitutes the long-demanded AI pause, its geopolitical implications for China's economic position, infrastructure buildout plans, enterprise ROI pressures, cybersecurity vulnerabilities, and OpenAI's vision of compute-driven interfaces.
writeup: The Big Technology AI Summit, hosted by Alex Kantrowitz on June 18, 2026, gathered industry figures including Greg Brockman, Mike Krieger, and Aaron Levie to discuss the federal government's forced recall of Anthropic's frontier models Fable and Mythos. Panelists debated whether the regulatory action amounts to the long-demanded AI pause and what it means for China's economic position. Additional segments covered infrastructure buildout plans, enterprise ROI pressures, cybersecurity vulnerabilities, and OpenAI's vision of compute-driven interfaces.
